channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: More Fat From Animals
item.description: Increases the ammount of fat received when harvesting animals

item.title: Immersive Debuffs
item.description: Disables sprinting when health or food bars are low.

item.title: Lanterns At Home
item.description: Lanterns offset themselves against their attached block - slabs, chiselled, etc

item.title: Geo Arch Compat
item.description: makes rocks from material needs work with items from medieval arch

item.title: BLACK HORN
item.description: Adds different color horns, charlotte made the original shapes, just color changed

item.title: Ambien's Racial Traits
item.description: Ambien's Racial Traits adds racial bonus to characters added from racial equality, skeletons, others

item.title: Projectile Flee
item.description: Causes animals to react when a projectile hits the ground nearby

item.title: Falx To Katana
item.description: Killing with a Falx has no honour in it, but this does.

item.title: Better Hoe
item.description: Adds function to create paths with the hoe.

item.title: Falx To Mace
item.description: Sometimes simplicity is best, throw your Falx down and take up the Mace!

item.title: Battle Towers
item.description: Add Towers with dangerous creatures to fight and explore in your world

item.title: Hobo's Flower Circlets
item.description: Cheap, craft-able, flower circlets. (Or flower crowns, but it really isn't a crown)

item.title: Wilderlands Onus Moderatus
item.description: - Using One Hand as a dependancy, creates three inventory bar slots with one backpack slot open.

item.title: Falx To War Axe
item.description: Falx not cutting hard enough, try a hefty War Axe instead.

item.title: Atlas
item.description: Integration testing for mods: xUnit scenarios against a real headless server, in your IDE and CI

item.title: Falx to Sword
item.description: The barbaric Falx not to your liking? Take this Arming Sword for a spin.

item.title: Auto Walk Extended
item.description: Toggle walking/running and sneaking. Supports also automatic climbing (stepup).

item.title: Player Model lib
item.description: Library for adding new player races

item.title: NDL ExpandedGrowth (Mushroom Growth Module)
item.description: Adds a method for growing mushrooms!

item.title: Murlok Vintage Server Patch
item.description: Collection of tweaks for the Murlok server and playthrough.

item.title: Floral Zones: Cape Region
item.description: Adds plants from the Cape Region to the game.

item.title: Asphyxia Rebreathed (Gas API)
item.description: Ever wanted to not be able to breathe in smoke or if you find an underground gas pocket? Kaboom!

item.title: AutoAttack
item.description: Client-side auto-attack for hostile creatures

item.title: HandbookCrashGuard
item.description: Small mod that fixes crashes caused by the test version of A Culinary Artillery and some other mods

item.title: Salty´s Cameraman
item.description: Lock the camera position and angle while player movement is free, for solo recording.

item.title: Kaschperle Class Mix
item.description: A revision mix from the popular class mod Aldi classes and Agi's Classes

item.title: Swixy Claim Chunk
item.description: Claiming made easy. Press [P], click a chunk, and it's yours!

item.title: Wildcraft x Expanded Foods Compatability
item.description: A work-in-progress mod that aims to act as a bridge between Wildcraft: F&N + Expanded Foods

item.title: Realistic Rapids
item.description: Makes rapids and waterwheels work more realistically. Official addon for Realistic Water

item.title: Realistic Water
item.description: Makes water spread and flow more realistically, so that you can build aqueducts, dams, canals etc
